# AutoTwin Guardian - Video Assets Directory (`public/videos/`)

Place your royalty-free MP4 videos directly inside this folder. The `BackgroundVideo.tsx` component will automatically pick up and loop through these files:

### Dashboard Playlist
- `dashboard1.mp4`
- `dashboard2.mp4`
- `dashboard3.mp4`

### Digital Twin Playlist
- `twin1.mp4`
- `twin2.mp4`
- `twin3.mp4`

### Journey Simulator Playlist
- `journey1.mp4`
- `journey2.mp4`
- `journey3.mp4`

### Diagnostics Playlist
- `diagnostics1.mp4`
- `diagnostics2.mp4`

### Predictive Maintenance Playlist
- `maintenance1.mp4`
- `maintenance2.mp4`

*Note: If local video files are not found, the BackgroundVideo component automatically falls back to online royalty-free CDN streams seamlessly without interruption.*
